name: pawz
description: Your persistent AI agent — same memory, same soul, same me. Connects to your local Pawz Desktop instance.

chatParticipants.name: pawz
chatParticipants.description: Your persistent AI agent — remembers everything, works on your code

pawz.webhookUrl.description: Pawz webhook server base URL. Start it in Pawz Desktop → Settings → Channels → Webhook.

pawz.authToken.markdownDescription: Auth token from **Pawz Desktop → Settings → Channels → Webhook → Copy Token**.

pawz.agentId.description: Agent ID to connect to. Matches the agent name in Pawz Desktop.

pawz.allowDangerousTools.description: Allow the agent to use file read/write, exec, and other workspace-modifying tools. Recommended: true for local use.
